contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Programs nav link site-wide + Onboarding pill on Butterfly Effect card
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/144
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/106
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod/pull/3
  
  Details:
  Layered two follow-ups on top of the Phase 1 credentialing-programs surface that shipped earlier today (TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#104 / _prod#2):
  
  1. Site-wide nav link to /programs.html. Inserted into the Projects dropdown across 10 nav-bearing pages: about-us, agroverse, edgar, faq, fundraisers, index, members, sunmint (root) and blog/index + beerhall/updates (one level deep, ../ prefix). Placed between Edgar Platform and Fundraisers so sibling concepts stay adjacent — Programs is the learner-facing lens of what fundraisers.html shows from the funder-facing lens. faq.html got two insertions because it has two dropdown blocks (desktop + mobile).
  
  2. Onboarding pill on the Butterfly Effect card. Extended the manifest schema with a  field (active / onboarding / archived) — spec change documented in agentic_ai_context/CREDENTIALING_PROGRAM_PAGES.md §6 (PR #144). programs.html now fetches each card's manifest at render time and surfaces a status pill when status !== 'active'. butterfly-effect/manifest.json ships with  (cohort empty until ERA records the first cert); tribomirim manifest omits the field so its card stays clean. Flipping to active later is a one-line manifest edit.
  
  Live verification (headless Chromium against https://truesight.me/):
    - programs.html: tribomirim card has hidden pill; butterfly-effect card shows visible 'Onboarding' pill with correct class chrome
    - members.html Projects dropdown order: Agroverse → Sunmint → Edgar → Programs → Fundraisers, matching the intent
    - zero console errors
  
  PRs merged 2026-05-16:
    - TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context#144 (squash 043b47f) — spec update
    - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta#106 (squash ce93785) — nav + pill
    - TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_prod#3 (squash 9169220) — mirror
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
